### Product Information

- Safely clean your leather or vinyl surfaces!

- Helps prep leather for coating applications

- Does not contain any softening or preserving additives

- Product Code: GY-7802

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 3 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The Gyeon Leather Cleaner Natural allows you to gently remove light contamination from your leather surfaces! Dirt, grime and light oily residue is no match for this unique formula. Leather Cleaner does not contain any softening or preserving additives and is safe on all modern types of leather. There are two cleaning options, strong and natural. Strong works best on heavily soiled leather surfaces, while natural is gentler and designed for maintenance cleanings. For added cleaning power, Gyeon recommends using the [Gyeon Leather Brush](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Leather-Brush-P1847/) as well. This high-quality formula also helps prep your leather if you want to apply a leather coating like Gyeon Leather Coat afterward. If you are looking to lightly clean or maintain your leather seats the Gyeon Leather Cleaner Natural should be your choice!



**Cleaning Options:**



- [Leather Cleaner Strong](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Leather-Cleaner-P1515/500-ml-S1/) - Designed to clean heavily soiled leather areas.


- [Leather Cleaner Natural](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Leather-Cleaner-Mild-P1843/500-ml-S1/) - Best suited for lightly soild leather or as a maintenance cleaner.


### From The Label

#### Product Description

Mild and safe, pH-neutral cleaner for all types of modern automotive leather, including nappa and semi-aniline upholstery. 


**


- Perfect for daily use

- Safe on all types of leather

- Mild cleaning action
**


#### Directions

Vacuum upholstery before cleaning. Spray on a small area and clean with Q2M LeatherBrush or Q2M ScrubPad. Remove dirt in a straight motion. Do not rub in with the microfibre. Wipe with a lightly damp cloth to remove excess of product. ** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Billy S. on 2/6/2022

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I recommend the strong formula over the mild, not enough cleaning power. But for wipe down works perfect

Reviewed by Michael B. on 7/12/2021

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I love this product! With white vegan leather seats in my Tesla it's either trust a quality product or you're doomed as there is no forgiveness on white. This product is up to the task. I have nothing but things to say. It cleans, doesn't leave a residue, and the seats aren't slippery after use. Two big thumbs up!!

Reviewed by Nicholas C. on 3/11/2019

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Excellent product - as effective as a Leatherique treatment at a fraction of the cost and time involved. So far I've used it on two minivans with a good bit of grime on the front seats. It's much more effective than Meguiar's APC as well; one application with a horsehair brush did as well as three applications of APC. It foams up well with brush agitation, but two wipes with a damp cloth took care of any residue.

Pros: Mild scent, very effective, foams well, wipes off easily

Cons: Wish it came in gallon or 4l
